examplemod.ponder.example_ponder.text_1: Every block here is loaded from example_ponder.nbt
examplemod.ponder.example_ponder.text_2: Block entities like this sign render and tick just as they do in-world
examplemod.ponder.example_ponder.text_3: Two Mechanical Arms flank the sign, proving Create's own blocks work too
